title: Talk:List of Iranian officials killed during the 2026 Iran war
wikitext: {{Talk header}} {{Contentious topics/talk notice|a-i}} {{WikiProject banner shell|class=list|collapsed=yes|1= {{WikiProject Death|importance=}} {{WikiProject Iran|importance=high}} {{WikiProject Lists|importance=}} {{WikiProject Military history|Middle-Eastern=yes|Post-Cold-War=y|list=yes|b1=yes|b2=no|b3=yes|b4=yes|b5=no}} }} == Should Ahmadinejad be added? == Should [[Mahmoud Ahmadinejad]] be added, because he was a member of the [[Expediency Discernment Council]]? [[Special:Contributions/~2026-13302-23|~2026-13302-23]] ([[User talk:~2026-13302-23|talk]]) 14:03, 1 March 2026 (UTC) :Currently [[Talk:Mahmoud Ahmadinejad#Death|the sources vary]]. ''If'' his death is confirmed, then probably splitting into two tables for ''officials killed while still in office'' versus ''former officials killed'' would make sense (we can't write ''current officials killed'' because if they're dead, then they're no longer officials). [[User:Boud|Boud]] ([[User talk:Boud|talk]]) 18:42, 1 March 2026 (UTC) :Should Mansoureh Khojasteh Bagherzadeh as Spouse of the Supreme Leader of Iran be includded? [[Special:Contributions/~2026-13628-89|~2026-13628-89]] ([[User talk:~2026-13628-89|talk]]) 16:39, 2 March 2026 (UTC) == Unconfirmed section == I feel like an unconfirmed section should be added, especially since it is the early stages of the war and many Iranian officials have been claimed to be killed but haven’t been confirmed yet. [[User:F18Pilot|F18Pilot]] ([[User talk:F18Pilot|talk]]) 23:19, 1 March 2026 (UTC) :I count 16 in the table, but the lead says {{tq|estimated total of around 40 officials}}. Are the other ~24 unconfirmed? [[User:Some1|Some1]] ([[User talk:Some1|talk]]) 00:27, 2 March 2026 (UTC) ::Yup. The Iranian government hasn’t come out and confirmed it. [[User:F18Pilot|F18Pilot]] ([[User talk:F18Pilot|talk]]) 02:29, 2 March 2026 (UTC) :::Can you give an example of an unconfirmed death along with the source? [[User:Some1|Some1]] ([[User talk:Some1|talk]]) 02:56, 2 March 2026 (UTC) ::::I think [[Mahmoud Ahmadinejad]] is at least one. [[User:F18Pilot|F18Pilot]] ([[User talk:F18Pilot|talk]]) 16:36, 3 March 2026 (UTC) :Support. [[User:RScheiber|RScheiber]] ([[User talk:RScheiber|talk]]) 13:06, 3 March 2026 (UTC) == Why Amhadinejad was removed? == Despite several sources confirmed his death, it was unilaterally revoved. Please, don't do remove information without consensus especially if it has sources. It's against the rules. [[User:ImperialSupreme|ImperialSupreme]] ([[User talk:ImperialSupreme|talk]]) 09:59, 2 March 2026 (UTC) :I don't think it's disputed that he's dead, but he was not a current Iranian official. And it's up to those seeking to include information to justify including it, not on the remover to justify removing it, see [[WP:ONUS]]. [[User:331dot|331dot]] ([[User talk:331dot|talk]]) 10:01, 2 March 2026 (UTC) ::Amhadinejad is a member of the Expediency Discernment Council making him a current Iranian official even if he's not the President anymore so he should be included here too. Also another user unilaterally removed his death from own page. [[User:ImperialSupreme|ImperialSupreme]] ([[User talk:ImperialSupreme|talk]]) 10:07, 2 March 2026 (UTC) :::His death is disputed. [[User:WWGB|WWGB]] ([[User talk:WWGB|talk]]) 10:28, 2 March 2026 (UTC) ::::His death is not "disputed"; only a few Wikipedia users are eliminating content WITH SOURCES. [[User:ImperialSupreme|ImperialSupreme]] ([[User talk:ImperialSupreme|talk]]) 11:06, 2 March 2026 (UTC) :::::Iran withdrew their statement he was killed. We need either an independent source that he is dead, or agreement between Israel/US and Iran that he is dead. [[User:331dot|331dot]] ([[User talk:331dot|talk]]) 11:08, 2 March 2026 (UTC) == [[Mohammad Raad]] == Does it make the list? [[User:Нейроманьяк|Нейроманьяк]] ([[User talk:Нейроманьяк|talk]]) 12:20, 2 March 2026 (UTC) :Hello [[User:Нейроманьяк|Нейроманьяк]] ([[User talk:Нейроманьяк|talk]]) 20:09, 2 March 2026 (UTC) ::He's not dead, according to the article. He's a Lebanese official, not Iranian. [[User:331dot|331dot]] ([[User talk:331dot|talk]]) 22:48, 2 March 2026 (UTC) == Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 2 March 2026 == {{edit extended-protected|List of Iranian officials killed during the 2026 Iran conflict|answered=yes}} There are slots without images, but the original articles have images [[User:KKondor1993|KKondor1993]] ([[User talk:KKondor1993|talk]]) 15:32, 2 March 2026 (UTC) :{{not done}}''':''' See [[WP:FAIRUSE]], specifically regarding images. [[User:EF5|'''E''']][[Special:Contributions/EF5|'''F''']][[Special:Contributions/EF5|'''5''']] 15:45, 2 March 2026 (UTC) == Gholam Rezaeian == I think he is accidentally mentioned twice here. [[Special:Contributions/~2026-10111-9|~2026-10111-9]] ([[User talk:~2026-10111-9|talk]]) 23:50, 2 March 2026 (UTC) ==Possible misinformation or disinformation about Hossein Jabal Amelian== There is no "Hossein Jabal Amelian" in the source used to cite his death [https://www.cbsnews.com/live-updates/israel-us-attack-iran-trump-says-major-combat-operations/ ], nor is there any indication that he was killed in a nuclear-related attack. I Can not do it myself but please correct this by either removing the false information or confirm it with a reliable source. [[User:Prxtxnitx|Prxtxnitx]] ([[User talk:Prxtxnitx|talk]]) 11:08, 3 March 2026 (UTC) :I have replaced the source you link to in the article with on one of the sources used in the newly [[Hossein_Jabal_Amelian|created article]] about him. [[User:The Hurdy Gurdy Man|The Hurdy Gurdy Man]] ([[User talk:The Hurdy Gurdy Man|talk]]) 20:16, 3 March 2026 (UTC)

sections.line: Possible misinformation or disinformation about Hossein Jabal Amelian
